statement: In every magma, Equation 1548 (`x = (y * y) * (z * (w * y))`) implies Equation 4004 (`x * y = (z * (x * w)) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0739
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y y) (op z (op w y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op x w)) u)
